title: Steve Goes Fishing
body:
Step into the peaceful and captivating world of Steve Goes Fishing, a complete overhaul of Minecraft’s fishing system inspired by the charm and gameplay of Cat Goes Fishing. This mod reimagines fishing from a passive pastime into a rewarding, skill-based experience full of depth, discovery, and delight.

Here is a video explaining the mod:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BkIPieKtmVI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


✔️ Interactive Fishing Gameplay
Engage in an all-new fishing minigame where timing, line tension, and fish behavior matter. No more idle clicking—every tug and splash counts. Fish pull back on the line and chase the hook making a healthy challenge to catch rare items or fish.

✔️ Authentic Loot Tables
Enjoy fully accurate loot that honors vanilla design while purely focusing on expanding gameplay. From pufferfish to enchanted books, it’s all here.

✔️ Immersive Sounds & Visuals
Feel the snap of the line, the pull of the rod, and the splash of your next big catch with new sounds and visual feedback that bring fishing to life.

✔️ Seamless Vanilla Integration
No new dimensions or bloated content—just a beautiful, lightweight experience that slides (naturally?) into your Minecraft world.
